name: Pagination
description: Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

api.name: Pagination
api.description: Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Fully compositional content (PaginationContent, PaginationItem, etc.). When set, data-driven mode is disabled and this content renders verbatim instead.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: The current 1-based page. Setting this (without ChildContent) enables data-driven mode, which auto-renders prev/next and numbered page buttons.

parameters.name: PageChanged
parameters.description: Fired with the newly clamped page number when the user clicks a page, prev/next button, or when a shrunk total forces the current page back in range.

parameters.name: TotalPages
parameters.description: Total number of pages, for data-driven mode. Takes precedence over TotalItems/PageSize when both are supplied.

parameters.name: TotalItems
parameters.description: Total item count, for data-driven mode; combined with PageSize to compute the page count when TotalPages is not set directly.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Items per page, used with TotalItems to compute the total page count in data-driven mode. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: SiblingCount
parameters.description: Pages shown on each side of the current page (default 1).

parameters.name: BoundaryCount
parameters.description: Pages always shown at the very start/end (default 1).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root nav.

events.name: PageChanged
events.description: Fired with the newly clamped page number when the user clicks a page, prev/next button, or when a shrunk total forces the current page back in range.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))"
                           Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        @for (int i = 1; i <= _totalPages; i++)
        {
            var page = i;
            <PaginationItem IsActive="@(page == _currentPage)"
                           OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(page))">
                @page
            </PaginationItem>
        }
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))"
                       Disabled="@(_currentPage >= _totalPages)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

@code {
    private int _currentPage = 1;
    private int _totalPages = 5;

    private void GoToPage(int page)
    {
        if (page >= 1 && page <= _totalPages)
            _currentPage = page;
    }
}

examples.title: Compact
examples.code:
<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Color="muted" Class="px-3 flex items-center">@_currentPage / @_totalPages</Lumeo.Text>
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage >= _totalPages)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

examples.title: Size
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_paginationSize">
    <SegmentedItem Value="sm">Sm</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="md">Md</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="lg">Lg</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>

<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
        {
            var page = i;
            <PaginationItem IsActive="@(page == _currentPage)"
                            OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(page))"
                            Class="@(_paginationSize switch { \"sm\" => \"h-7 w-7 text-xs\", \"lg\" => \"h-11 w-11 text-base\", _ => \"\"  })">
                @page
            </PaginationItem>
        }
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage >= 5)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

@code {
    private string _paginationSize = "md";
    private int _currentPage = 1;
}

mdSummary:
# Pagination

Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pagination

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Pagination | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Fully compositional content (PaginationContent, PaginationItem, etc.). When set, data-driven mode is disabled and this content renders verbatim instead. |
| Pagination | Page | `int?` | `` | The current 1-based page. Setting this (without ChildContent) enables data-driven mode, which auto-renders prev/next and numbered page buttons. |
| Pagination | PageChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` | Fired with the newly clamped page number when the user clicks a page, prev/next button, or when a shrunk total forces the current page back in range. |
| Pagination | TotalPages | `int?` | `` | Total number of pages, for data-driven mode. Takes precedence over TotalItems/PageSize when both are supplied. |
| Pagination | TotalItems | `int?` | `` | Total item count, for data-driven mode; combined with PageSize to compute the page count when TotalPages is not set directly. |
| Pagination | PageSize | `int` | `10` | Items per page, used with TotalItems to compute the total page count in data-driven mode. Defaults to 10. |
| Pagination | SiblingCount | `int` | `1` | Pages shown on each side of the current page (default 1). |
| Pagination | BoundaryCount | `int` | `1` | Pages always shown at the very start/end (default 1). |
| Pagination | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav. |
| Pagination | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root nav. |
| PaginationContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The pagination items (PaginationItem, prev/next, PaginationEllipsis) rendered as an ordered list of buttons. |
| PaginationContent | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root ul. |
| PaginationContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root ul. |
| PaginationEllipsis | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| PaginationEllipsis | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the ellipsis span. |
| PaginationEllipsis | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the ellipsis span. |
| PaginationItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The page number's visible label. |
| PaginationItem | IsActive | `bool` | `false` | Marks this item as the current page: styles it with a bordered/shadowed look and sets aria-current="page". |
| PaginationItem | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Fired when the button is clicked. |
| PaginationItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| PaginationItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the button. |
| PaginationItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the button. |
| PaginationNext | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Fired when the button is clicked. |
| PaginationNext | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the button, e.g. when already on the last page. |
| PaginationNext | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| PaginationNext | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the button. |
| PaginationNext | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the button. |
| PaginationPrevious | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Fired when the button is clicked. |
| PaginationPrevious | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the button, e.g. when already on the first page. |
| PaginationPrevious | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| PaginationPrevious | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the button. |
| PaginationPrevious | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the button. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Pagination) — Fully compositional content (PaginationContent, PaginationItem, etc.). When set, data-driven mode is disabled and this content renders verbatim instead.
- `ChildContent` (PaginationContent) — The pagination items (PaginationItem, prev/next, PaginationEllipsis) rendered as an ordered list of buttons.
- `ChildContent` (PaginationItem) — The page number's visible label.

## Events
- `PageChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`) — Fired with the newly clamped page number when the user clicks a page, prev/next button, or when a shrunk total forces the current page back in range.

## Sub-components
- `PaginationContent`, `PaginationEllipsis`, `PaginationItem`, `PaginationNext`, `PaginationPrevious`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Density` (`Lumeo.Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Pagination />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-input`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Pagination/Pagination.razor`
- `UI/Pagination/PaginationContent.razor`
- `UI/Pagination/PaginationEllipsis.razor`
- `UI/Pagination/PaginationItem.razor`
- `UI/Pagination/PaginationNext.razor`
- `UI/Pagination/PaginationPrevious.razor`
